pi_items.source: Task description explicitly asks for 1280 and verifier.py checks against 1280
Task description explicitly asks for 800 and verifier.py checks against 800
Task description explicitly demands ' SEB_Lab3_Station' (with a leading space) and verifier.py validates it
Task description specifies 'Window' mode; SEB database commonly stores this as '1', and verifier.py validates against this exact list

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated exam configurations for SEB Server. By analyzing the setup scripts, task description, and verifier logic, it is verified that the target configuration 'Engineering Final Exam 2026' requires the main browser window width to be set to 1280, the height to 800, and the user agent suffix to ' SEB_Lab3_Station' (including the leading space). The expected browser view mode is 'Window', which corresponds to the internal database value '1'.
